findings.blocker: whnf heartbeat bomb (>3.2M heartbeats, exponential cost) at the concrete unit-𝟙_ instantiation of restr_map_homMk / the closing `exact key.symm`; NOT a math gap and NOT a budget issue — the iter-221 Over.map coherence obstacle is SOLVED (restr_map_homMk + dual_map_app_terminal axiom-clean in pieces). attempts.strategy: Discharge G with PresheafOfModules.naturality_apply of the dual section φ along (Over.homMk f.unop).op, transported across Over.map coherence by restr_map_homMk on both M and the unit 𝟙_

attempts.lean_error: (deterministic) timeout at whnf at the unit-𝟙_ instantiation of restr_map_homMk and the closing exact; restr_map_homMk M f (M abstract) is cheap, the explosion is specific to the concrete unit whose whnf normal form is enormous
attempts.insight: The blocker is purely elaboration cost localized to whnf-ing the unit 𝟙_ (nested ofPresheaf∘pushforward₀∘Over.map∘restrictScalars∘tensorObj∘unit). maxHeartbeats {1.6M, 3.2M} all time out → cost is ~exponential, not budget-bound. Three whnf-free fixes recorded: (1) generalize the unit before naturality_apply/exact; (2) use Mathlib pushforward_obj_map_apply' so matching is syntactic; (3) close G elementwise without `exact key.symm`.

next_steps: Re-dispatch SAME mathlib-build lane to close the naturality sorry via one of the 3 whnf-free routes (the reduction is done). Project sorry should return 81→80. If iter-223 still cannot tame the whnf bomb, that is a genuine churn signal → mathlib-analogist (cross-domain) consult on the unit-whnf explosion or restate the unit object to avoid the nested-defeq form.

next_steps: Consumed by the internalHomEval naturality reduction; complete.

attempts.strategy: private lemma: (restr X.unop N).map (Over.homMk f.unop).op = N.map f, isolating the heavy Over.map/pushforward₀ whnf defeq into its own heartbeat budget so it runs once
attempts.code_tried: private lemma restr_map_homMk ... (restr X.unop N).map (Over.homMk f.unop : Over.mk f.unop ⟶ Over.mk (𝟙 X.unop)).op = N.map f := rfl
attempts.insight: Axiom-clean for N ABSTRACT (cheap). rfl relies on deep whnf defeq between (restr=pushforward₀ (Over.forget X.unop)).map (Over.homMk f.unop).op and N.map f — fragile to changes in pushforward₀/Over.forget unfolding, but isolated by `private`. The SAME rfl-bridge instantiated at the concrete unit 𝟙_ is what triggers the heartbeat bomb in internalHomEval.
